summary: Tested variant cross-filtering bug fix on CollectionDetailPage.js. All 10 test cases PASSED. The bug where selecting 'Polished' finish falsely disabled '60x60cm' size for Grey color has been FIXED. Size buttons correctly enable/disable based on available products for the selected color+finish combination.
critical_code_review_comments: getProductColor (line 185-190): Correctly returns lowercase normalized color for case-insensitive matching
availableSizes (line 552-583): Correctly filters sizes by selected color AND finish
sizesForColor (line 586-591): Provides all sizes for selected color ignoring finish - used for enable/disable logic
sizesIgnoringFinish (line 597-601): Fallback for collections without color variants - prevents false disabling
Size button render (line 1795-1834): Correctly uses sizesForColor || sizesIgnoringFinish as fallback for determining if size is available in another finish
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for collection detail page
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Bluestone collection with 7 products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Variant cross-filtering bug is FIXED. The Bluestone collection has 7 products: 3 without explicit color (Polished 60x120cm, Matt 60x60cm, Polished 60x60cm) and 4 with colors (Beige Matt 60x60, Grey Matt 60x60, Grey Polished 60x60, White Matt 30x60). Key fix: getProductColor now returns lowercase for case-insensitive matching, and sizesIgnoringFinish provides fallback for collections without color variants.

test_results.test_3c_beige_60x120_disabled: PASS - 60x120cm is DISABLED for Beige (no Beige 60x120 product)

test_results.test_4c_white_60x120_disabled: PASS - 60x120cm is DISABLED for White (no White 60x120 product)
